codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking bug by splitting URL sync into writer/reader effects and explicitly handling the empty-query-string case as external URL state, which restores default filters/page/pageSize on back/forward to '/'. It also preserves URL reflection and URL-param preload behavior from the original feature.

summary: Reviewed features.json entry, both handoffs, transcript skeletons, commit 1f06d62 (fix), and commit 3e1f5d0 (original). The prior failure in src/App.tsx (empty query string skipped by URL→state sync, leaving stale filters) is resolved by the new reader effect branch for empty search params and verified behavior in the worker evidence. No new blocking or non-blocking regressions were identified within the fix scope.
